features.title: Powerful Features
features.description: Everything you need to manage, track, and streamline your dairy operations, securely and efficiently.

transactionManagement.title: Transaction Management
transactionManagement.description: Efficiently record and track daily milk transactions between sellers and dairy owners.

automatedBilling.title: Automated Billing
automatedBilling.description: Generate accurate 15-day bills automatically with detailed transaction summaries.

paymentTracking.title: Payment Tracking
paymentTracking.description: Monitor payment statuses and ensure timely settlements for all transactions.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Dairy Konnect
about.description1: Dairy Konnect is an end-to-end platform designed to digitalize and streamline the entire milk supply chain. It connects Admins, Dairies, Milk Vendors, and Farmers into one integrated ecosystem with role-based access and highly transparent workflows.
about.description2: The system ensures efficient milk collection, supply tracking, payment handling, and relationship management between all stakeholders, creating a transparent, error-free, and traceable milk supply chain.
about.latestFeaturesDescription: Streamline Dairy Operations Without the Complexity — Customizable, Scalable and User-Friendly Transaction Management Platform.

lightningFast.title: Lightning-Fast Transaction Recording
lightningFast.description: Record daily milk transactions instantly with minimal load times and optimized performance.

automatedBillingSystem.title: Automated Billing System
automatedBillingSystem.description: Generate accurate 15-day cycle bills automatically with detailed transaction summaries.

securePayment.title: Secure Payment Management
securePayment.description: Track payment statuses securely and ensure timely settlements for all stakeholders.

userTypeModal.title: Choose Your Role
userTypeModal.description: Select how you want to access the platform:

farmer.description: Manage your milk production and track transactions

footer.tagline: Built for the people who milk the morning.
footer.description: India's connected dairy ecosystem — apps, dashboards and feed, beautifully tied together.

testimonials.testimonial1: I've been using Dairy Konnect platform for nearly two years, and it has been incredibly user-friendly, making my daily transaction management much easier and more efficient.
testimonials.testimonial2: The automated billing system has transformed how I track my milk deliveries. Payment transparency and accuracy have improved significantly since using this platform.
testimonials.testimonial3: Dairy Konnect has streamlined our entire operation. The transaction recording and payment tracking features have made our dairy business more profitable and organized.

farmer.title: Farmer Portal
farmer.subtitle: Your comprehensive platform for milk supply management and payment tracking
farmer.description: A specialized platform designed to help farmers supply milk, track daily quantities, view transparent rate calculations, and monitor payment status. Login to access your farmer dashboard and manage your milk supply effectively.
farmer.keyFeaturesDesc: Everything you need to manage your milk supply and track payments transparently
farmer.whyChooseDesc: Get fair payments and complete transparency in your milk supply chain
farmer.readyToStartDesc: Login to access the Farmer Portal and start managing your milk supply today

dailySupply.title: Daily Supply Details
dailySupply.description: Record and track your daily milk supply with accurate quantity measurements and quality parameters.

rateCard.title: Rate Card Visibility
rateCard.description: View transparent rate calculations based on fat, SNF, and CLR readings. Know exactly what you're earning per liter.

paymentHistory.title: Payment History
paymentHistory.description: Track all your payments with detailed history. Monitor daily, weekly, and monthly payment status.

notifications.title: Notifications & Announcements
notifications.description: Stay updated with important announcements, rate changes, and notifications from your vendor and dairy.

supplyTracking.title: Supply Tracking
supplyTracking.description: Monitor your milk supply history, quality trends, and performance metrics over time.

vendorManagement.title: Vendor Management
vendorManagement.description: View your assigned vendor details, contact information, and maintain clear communication channels.

steps.step1Desc: Access your farmer dashboard by logging in with your credentials.
steps.step2Desc: Deliver your milk to your assigned vendor. The vendor will record quantity, quality readings (fat, SNF, CLR), and timing.
steps.step3Desc: Check your daily milk supply records, quality results, and rate per liter calculated based on fat/SNF content.
steps.step4Desc: Monitor your payment history and status. View daily, weekly, and monthly payment records for complete transparency.

benefits.fairRate: Fair rate calculation based on quality

farmerAppPage.eyebrow: Mobile App · Same data as Farmer Dashboard
farmerAppPage.titleAfter: that fits in one hand and one shed.
farmerAppPage.lead: The mobile mirror of the Farmer Dashboard. Designed with farmers, in farmer's fields. Same login, same data — log milk in the morning on your phone, review earnings in the evening on the laptop. Works offline first.
farmerAppPage.heroPanelBlurb: Log milk, track cattle, and see payouts on your phone — the same records as the Farmer web dashboard, syncing when you are back online.

features.title: Voice-first logging
features.body: "Lakshmi morning seven litres" — done. The app understands 11 Indian languages.

features.title: QR cow tags
features.body: Each cow gets a tag. Scan it to instantly log yield, vaccinate, or call the vet.

features.title: Smart alerts
features.body: Yield drop? Vaccination due? Heat cycle? Notifications you actually want.

features.title: Family access
features.body: Add your spouse or son to log when you can't. One farm, multiple hands.

farmerWebPage.lead: Same login, same data, and the same features as the Farmer App — with a layout built for laptops and desktops. Review earnings, cattle tables and reports without squinting at a phone.
farmerWebPage.syncBody: Log in once. Phone for the field, web for the desk. Everything stays in sync, including offline entries that upload when you're back online.
farmerWebPage.featuresLead: Everything you track on mobile — with full-width tables, charts and exports for home and office.

features.title: Full cattle grid
features.body: Compare every cow's yield, quality grade and health status side by side.

features.title: Earnings & payouts
features.body: Weekly and monthly charts, UPI trails and export-friendly summaries for your accountant.

features.title: Health & vaccines
features.body: Plan boosters, read visit notes, and coordinate follow-ups when you're not in the shed.

features.title: Reports & sharing
features.body: Download PDF summaries or share read-only views with co-op managers and family.

vendor.title: Milk Vendor Portal
vendor.subtitle: Your operational hub for milk collection and supply management
vendor.description: A specialized platform designed to help milk vendors collect milk from farmers, verify quality, supply to dairies, and manage farmer payments. Login to access your vendor dashboard and streamline your operations.
vendor.keyFeaturesDesc: Everything you need to efficiently manage milk collection and supply operations
vendor.responsibilitiesDesc: As a milk vendor, you are the operational link between farmers and dairies
vendor.readyToStartDesc: Login to access the Milk Vendor Portal and start managing your operations today

farmerManagement.title: Farmer Management
farmerManagement.description: Manage all farmers assigned to you. View farmer details, contact information, and supply history.

milkCollection.title: Milk Collection Recording
milkCollection.description: Record daily milk collection from farmers with accurate quantity, quality readings (fat, SNF, CLR), and timings.

dailySupply.title: Daily Supply Summary
dailySupply.description: Track and summarize daily milk supply to your dairy. Maintain complete records of all transactions.

paymentLedger.title: Farmer Payment Ledger
paymentLedger.description: Manage payment logs for all farmers. Track payments, generate reports, and maintain transparent records.

routeManagement.title: Route & Timing Management
routeManagement.description: Organize collection routes, manage timing schedules, and optimize your milk collection operations.

qualityVerification.title: Quality Verification
qualityVerification.description: Verify and record milk quality parameters including fat, SNF, and CLR readings for accurate rate calculation.

steps.step1Desc: Access your vendor dashboard by logging in with your credentials.
steps.step2Desc: Collect milk from your assigned farmers. Verify and record quantity, quality readings (fat, SNF, CLR), and collection timings.
steps.step3Desc: Supply collected milk to your assigned dairy. Maintain daily supply summaries and complete transaction records.
steps.step4Desc: Track and manage payment logs for all farmers. Generate payment reports and maintain transparent payment records.

dairy.title: Dairy Portal
dairy.subtitle: Your central hub for milk processing and supply chain management
dairy.description: A specialized platform designed to help dairies manage vendors, monitor milk collection, track quality metrics, and handle payment cycles. Login to access your dairy dashboard and optimize your operations.
dairy.keyFeaturesDesc: Everything you need to efficiently manage your dairy operations and supply chain
dairy.capabilitiesDesc: Act as a central processing and monitoring hub for your entire supply chain
dairy.readyToStartDesc: Login to access the Dairy Portal and start managing your operations today

vendorManagement.title: Vendor Management
vendorManagement.description: Manage all vendors under your dairy. View vendor details, performance metrics, and supply records.

farmerNetwork.title: Farmer Network Overview
farmerNetwork.description: Get a comprehensive view of all farmers in your network through your vendors. Monitor supply trends and relationships.

collectionReports.title: Milk Collection Reports
collectionReports.description: View detailed milk collection reports with quality metrics (fat, SNF, CLR), quantity, and timings from all vendors.

paymentManagement.title: Vendor Payment Management
paymentManagement.description: Handle payment cycles for vendors. Track payments, generate reports, and maintain transparent financial records.

analytics.title: Supply Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: Analyze supply trends, monitor performance metrics, and get insights to improve operational efficiency.

qualityMonitoring.title: Quality Monitoring
qualityMonitoring.description: Monitor milk quality parameters across all vendors. Track fat, SNF, and CLR readings for quality assurance.

steps.step1Desc: Access your dairy dashboard by logging in with your credentials.
steps.step2Desc: Oversee all vendors assigned to your dairy. Monitor their performance, supply records, and manage vendor relationships.
steps.step3Desc: View detailed milk collection reports from all vendors. Track quantity, quality metrics (fat, SNF, CLR), and collection timings.
steps.step4Desc: Manage payment cycles for all vendors. Track payments, generate reports, and maintain transparent financial records.
steps.step5Desc: Use analytics dashboard to analyze supply trends, monitor performance metrics, and get insights to improve operational efficiency.

vet.title: Our Vet +
vet.subtitle: Your comprehensive veterinary medicine app for all farm animals
vet.description: A specialized platform designed to help farmers and animal owners find the right medicines, consult with veterinary doctors, and manage animal health effectively. Login to access expert veterinary care for cows, buffaloes, and all your farm animals.
vet.keyFeaturesDesc: Everything you need to ensure the health and well-being of your farm animals
vet.supportedAnimalsDesc: Our vet app supports comprehensive care for all types of farm animals
vet.readyToStartDesc: Login to access the Our Vet + app and start managing your animals' health today

symptomFinder.title: Symptom-Based Medicine Finder
symptomFinder.description: Enter your animal's symptoms and get instant recommendations for appropriate medicines and treatments.

consult.title: Consult with Vet Doctors
consult.description: Connect with certified veterinary doctors for professional consultations and expert advice on animal health.

medicineDatabase.title: Comprehensive Medicine Database
medicineDatabase.description: Access a vast database of medicines and treatments specifically designed for cows, buffaloes, and all farm animals.

healthRecords.title: Health Records Management
healthRecords.description: Maintain detailed health records for all your animals, track treatments, and monitor recovery progress.

preventiveCare.title: Preventive Care Guidelines
preventiveCare.description: Get preventive care recommendations and vaccination schedules to keep your animals healthy and disease-free.

emergencyCare.title: Emergency Care Support
emergencyCare.description: Quick access to emergency care protocols and immediate veterinary assistance when your animals need urgent help.

steps.step1Desc: Create an account or login to access the veterinary app and all its features.
steps.step2Desc: Enter your animal's symptoms and get instant recommendations for appropriate medicines and treatment options from our comprehensive database.
steps.step3Desc: Schedule consultations with certified veterinary doctors for professional diagnosis, treatment plans, and expert advice tailored to your animal's specific needs.
steps.step4Desc: Keep track of all your animals' health records, treatments, and medical history in one convenient place for better care management.

vetAppPage.eyebrow: Mobile App · One app, two sign-ins
vetAppPage.intro: VetKonnect ships with two sign-in modes built into the same app. Farmers get tele-consults, vaccination reminders, AI symptom checker, SOS, and the livestock marketplace. Veterinarians get an appointment queue, case histories, e-prescriptions and earnings.
vetAppPage.toggleHintFarmer: Preview above: farmer home, vet directory, and Symptom AI — the screens a cattle owner sees after signing in.
vetAppPage.toggleHintDoctor: Preview above: appointment queue, live consult, and earnings — the screens a veterinarian sees after signing in.
vetAppPage.dualLead: When a farmer signs in, they see a marketplace and a vet directory. When a doctor signs in, they see appointments, case files and earnings.
vetAppPage.farmerCardBody: Get instant access to vets, manage your cattle's health, browse the livestock marketplace, and never miss a vaccination.
vetAppPage.doctorCardBody: Run your practice from your phone. Manage appointments, see full case histories, write digital prescriptions, get paid instantly.

sharedFeatures.title: Video tele-consults
sharedFeatures.body: Show the vet what you're seeing. Most consults wrap in under 10 minutes.

sharedFeatures.title: Symptom-checker AI
sharedFeatures.body: Trained on 50,000+ cattle case histories. Tells you when it's urgent and when it's not.

sharedFeatures.title: Vaccination scheduler
sharedFeatures.body: Auto-tracks every cow's calendar. Never miss a booster, never double-vaccinate.

sharedFeatures.title: SOS one-tap call
sharedFeatures.body: The nearest available vet picks up. Average response time: under 4 minutes.

vetAppPage.marketBody: Buy or sell cows, buffalo and calves with full health records and a 7-day return guarantee. India's first vet-backed cattle marketplace, built right into the app you already use.

pricingPage.heroLead: Every collection gets a fair, transparent price computed in real time — based on quality, region, season, demand, and the going market rate. No more haggling. No more notebook math.
pricingPage.liveFooterLeft: From published rate cards · updates when dairies sync
pricingPage.calcSectionLead: Move the sliders to see how quality and volume change your daily payout — exactly how our engine prices every collection.
pricingPage.calcDesc: Adjust the values below to see your real-time payout.
pricingPage.factorsLead: Six factors weighted by our pricing model:
pricingPage.publishedLead: Browse every active card from connected dairies. Open a chart for the full FAT × SNF grid.

milkPrices.title: Milk Prices
milkPrices.subtitle: Compare milk prices from different dairies based on FAT & SNF
milkPrices.noRatesDesc: No dairies have published their milk prices yet.

feedsPage.heroLead: Vet-formulated cattle feed delivered to your village. Daily concentrates, mineral mixes and calf starters — backed by lab-tested protein, fibre and energy values.
feedsPage.subTitle: Never run out of feed. Save 12% on every bag.
feedsPage.subLead: Set a delivery cycle (weekly, fortnightly, monthly). Pause anytime. Free delivery above ₹2,000.

marketPage.title: Milk market prices
marketPage.subtitle: Benchmark rates for cow and buffalo milk — filter by region, milk type, and unit. Updated regularly for farmers, vendors, and dairies.

ecosystem.eyebrow: 4 user roles · 4 browser surfaces · 2 mobile apps
ecosystem.titleEm: Every role in your dairy chain.
ecosystem.description: From the farmer with one cow to the cooperative running twelve routes — DairyKonnect gives every user the exact interface they need, on the device they actually use.
ecosystem.dashboardTitle: Built for desks, browsers & big screens
ecosystem.appsTitle: Designed for the people in the field

dashboards.title: Dairy Dashboard
dashboards.desc: For processing plants and cooperatives — track inbound milk, lab tests, processing batches, packaging and dispatch in one flow.

dashboards.title: Vendor Dashboard
dashboards.desc: For collection agents — manage routes, scan farmer QRs, log volumes with auto-quality, calculate payments instantly.

dashboards.title: Farmer Dashboard
dashboards.desc: The web counterpart to the Farmer App. Same data, larger screen — perfect for reviewing earnings, cattle records and reports.

dashboards.title: Vet App
dashboards.desc: Explore VetKonnect — tele-consults, vaccination programs and marketplace care for farmers; appointments, e-prescriptions and case history for clinics.

mobileApps.title: Farmer App
mobileApps.desc: The mobile mirror of the Farmer Dashboard. Track every cow, log every drop, get vet help, order feed — all from your phone, even offline.
mobileApps.visualLine2: Mobile-first for farmers in the field. Web for review and reporting at home.

mobileApps.title: VetKonnect App
mobileApps.desc: One app, two sign-in modes — farmers get vet consults, vaccination calendars, symptom AI & livestock marketplace; vets get appointments, case history, prescriptions.

features.title: Speaks 11 Indian languages
features.desc: Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Marathi, Bengali — voice-first interfaces for low-literacy users.

features.title: Works offline first
features.desc: Every entry queues locally and syncs when the network returns. Built for rural connectivity.

features.title: Secure payments, instant
features.desc: UPI auto-payouts every cycle. No middlemen, no delays. Farmers see earnings in real time.

features.title: AI quality, every collection
features.desc: Computer-vision SNF & fat estimation, plus price prediction for the next 7 days.

steps.title: Farmer logs milk
steps.desc: Two taps in the app. Yield, session, cow — all captured in seconds.

steps.title: Vendor verifies
steps.desc: QR scan at collection point auto-fills SNF, fat and weight.

steps.title: AI prices it
steps.desc: Quality grade computed instantly, payment calculated by today's rate.

steps.title: Money arrives
steps.desc: UPI payout hits the farmer's account before the next milking.

ai.lead: DairyKonnect's vision-AI grades every milk collection in under 2 seconds. Combined with our 7-day market price forecast, farmers and vendors finally get pricing power that big buyers have always had.
ai.f1Desc: One photo. No reagents, no lab. 96% accuracy vs. lactometer.
ai.f2Desc: ML model trained on 4 years of mandi data, weather and demand cycles.
ai.f3Desc: Flags water, urea, starch and detergent. Vendor sees it before payment.

items.quote: "My cousin used to keep milk records in a notebook. Now we just open the app. Last month our earnings went up by ₹3,200 because we caught a low-yield cow early."
items.name: Sunita Kale

items.quote: "VetKonnect saved a calf last winter. The vet did the consult on video at 11 PM and walked us through it. That's not a feature, that's a lifeline."
items.name: Rajan Vora

items.quote: "As a vendor, I used to lose 2 hours a day on paperwork. The QR collection workflow cut that to 20 minutes — and farmers trust the price now because the AI shows them."
items.name: Mahesh Reddy

rewards.lead: Earn points on every litre delivered, every vet visit booked, every feed bag purchased. Refer another farmer or customer — both of you get bonus credits.

pricing.lead: Start free. Upgrade when you scale. No setup fees, no lock-ins, cancel anytime.
pricing.starterDesc: For individual farmers with up to 5 cattle.
starterFeats: Farmer App for up to 5 cattle

faq.sidebarLead: Still curious? Reach out to our team — we typically respond within an hour during business days.

items.q: Does the farmer app work without internet?
items.a: Yes. Every entry — milk yield, vet booking, feed order — is saved offline first. The moment you reconnect, everything syncs in the background. We've built it for villages where 4G is a courtesy, not a guarantee.

items.q: How accurate is the AI quality check?
items.a: Our vision model achieves 96% agreement with traditional lactometer readings on SNF and fat. We re-train monthly on regional samples so accuracy improves as we expand.

items.q: Can I get my own branded app for my cooperative?
items.a: Absolutely. Our Enterprise plan includes white-label apps, your logo, brand colors and even your domain. Most cooperatives go live in 2-3 weeks.
UPI auto-payouts based on your billing cycle (daily, weekly, or fortnightly). Payments are calculated against AI-graded quality and current market rates, then sent directly to the farmer's bank.
Yes. We're SOC 2 aligned, host data in India, and never sell anonymized or identified data to third parties. You own your data. Full export available anytime.

finalCta.description: Onboard your first 50 farmers free. Setup in under 24 hours. We'll even import your existing records.
